titleStmt.title: SII 26.719: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 719. (A.R. No. 668 of 1909.) TIRUNEḌUṄGAḶAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

p.hi: Tribhº Sundarapāṇḍyadēva I: Year (lost), month (name lost) śu. 13, Monday, (Nakshatra name lost): C. 11th century.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged. It records that a certain Paḷḷamuḍaiyāṉ Irāmapirāṉ Śarvatīrttamuḍaiyār of Ōśāmā Vāṉavaṉmādēvinallūr of Muttūṟṟuk-kūṟṟam in Pāṇḍi-maṇḍalam, made a gift of two nandā lamps to the temple of the god Tiruneḍuṅgaḷa-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār of Vaḍakavi-nāḍu in Pāṇḍikulapati-vaḷanāḍu, and to provide for this he gave a sum of 8,000 Aṉṟāḍu Naṟkāśu to the temple in lieu of which, the temple authorities sold a land, 7-1/2 mā in extent, from the tax-free temple tirunāmattukkāṇi and in Māṅkāṉam alias Nittamaṇavāḷanallūr in Vaḍakavi-nāḍu in Pāṇḍikulapati-vaḷanāḍu. It is stated that the temple authorities had to agree to pay the taxes in respect of the land themselves. A number of signatories also figure.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koccaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīsundarapāṇṭiyatevaṟku
ṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu Ekādaśiyum tiṅkaḷkiḻamai tu nāḷ pāṇṭikulapati vaḷanāṭṭu vaṭakavināṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruneṭuṅka
ḷa Uṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil tevakaṉmikaḷom nilavilai pramāṇa Icaivu tiṭṭa pāṇ(ṭ)ṭimaṇṭalattu muttūṟṟu kū
ṟṟattu Ocāmāvāṉavaṉmātevinallūr paḷḷamuṭaiyāṉ Irāmapirāṉ sarvva- tittamuṭaiyāṟkku Iṟṟai nāḷāl Iṉnāyaṉāṟku tirunu
ṉtāviḷakkupuṟamāka Iṭṭa tiruviḷakku Iraṇṭukku viṟṟu kuṭutta Iṟaiyili nilamāvatu pāṇṭikulapati vaḷa
nāṭṭu vaṭakavināṭṭu Iṉnāyaṉār tirunāmattukāṇi Iṟaiyiliyāka vilai koṇṭuṭaiya māṅkāṉamāṉa
nittamaṇavāḷa nallūril muṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu nilam kālum Itaṉ kiḻakku meṟpa
Āka nila Eḻumāvaraikkum yiṉilattāl varum mākal Uḷḷiṭṭa kaṭamai nāṅkaḷe yiṟuppa
tāka viṟṟu kuṭuttom viṟṟu kuṭuttu koḷvaṉa Emmil Icainta vilaipporuḷ Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu Eṇ
ṇāyirattāl vilaippaṭi paṇam nāṟpatu Āvaṇakkaḷariye kāṭṭeṟi kaic cilavaṟa kaikoṇṭu viṟṟu vilai
pramāṇa Icaivu tiṭṭuk kuṭutta Iṉnilattu menokkiṉa maramum kiṇOkkiṉa kiṇaṟum maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭa
urimaikaḷum Uḷpaṭa viṟṟuvilai pramāṇa Icaivu tiṭṭu kuṭuttom paḷḷamuṭaiyāṉ Irāmapirāṉ sarvvatitta
muṭaiyāṟkku Uṭaiyar tiruneṭuṅkaḷa Uṭaiya nāyaṉār Āditaṇḍeśvara tevakaṉmikaḷom ....ippaṭikku Ivai
śvaranam(p)pi Eḻuttu Araiyatevareḻuttu Ūrkaṇkāṇi tiruñāṉacampantare
ḻuttu koyil kaṇakku perumpuliyūruṭaiyāṉ nittamaṇavāḷap piriyaṉ Eḻuttu pukaḻāparaṇa paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ śrī keyamāṇikka caturvvetimaṅkalattu virairāceṉtiracoḻa- prammārāyaneṉ komaṭattu Irāma
nampiyeṉ kiḷiyūruṭaiyāṉ ceḻiyakaṅkaneṉ cākkuṭaiyāṉ pāṇ(ṭ)ṭiyaraiyaneṉ karupūruṭaiyāṉ veḷāṉ viḻupparaiya
neṉ ciṟṟukavūruṭaiyāṉ cem(p)piyaṉ veti veḷāneṉ Itu śrī māheśvarar rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 26.719 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
